item.title: LLMs for Psychological Digital Content Analysis (SoSe 2026)
item.description:
Opal: Link here.

Time: Thursdays, 5. DS

Location: APB/E010

Module: INF-BAS3 (Software- und Web-Engineering)

Language: English

Assessment: oral exam

Description:

This seminar explores how psychological concepts can be systematically studied in digital content using LLM-based annotation workflows, from construct operationalization to prompt engineering and evaluation.

item.title: Methods for Computational Social Sciences (SoSe 2026)
item.description:
Opal: Link here.

Time (Lecture): Mondays, 4. DS
Time (Exercise): 5. DS

Location: VMB/0302 (Lecture), APB/E010 (Exercise)

Module: INF-BAS3 (Software- und Web-Engineering)

Language: English

Assessment: oral exam

Description:

The lecture will introduce you to social science research questions and findings, while the exercise will give you the practical skills to answer social questions yourself using computational tools.
